name: Free Birthday Cake
description_en: Complimentary slice of birthday cake for groups of 4 or more. Just let us know when booking.
terms: Must mention birthday at time of booking. One cake per booking.

name: Free Soy Pudding
description_en: Complimentary soy pudding dessert for every dine-in customer.

name: Eatigo Early Dinner Discount
description_en: Up to 50% off a la carte during off-peak slots on Eatigo app. Early lunch (11:30 AM) and early dinner (5:30 PM) slots.
description_zh: Eatigo早市优惠，a la carte最高50%折扣。
terms: Book through Eatigo app. Excludes set meals. Time slots vary — check app for current availability.

name: Refillable Side Dishes
description_en: Every set meal comes with 3 refillable banchan (including kimchi) and Korean corn silk tea.
description_zh: 每份套餐免费续3种韩式小菜和玉米须茶。
terms: Applies to all set meals dine-in only.
